zh.Ettington, Warwickshire, England, United: 英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾艾廷頓
zh.Staunton Harold, Leicestershire, England: 英國萊希斯特斯爾史道頓 哈羅德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Shirley Esq於1463年出生在英國斯塔福爾恩維爾時，他的父親John Shirley, Lord of Ettington32歲，母親Eleanor Willoughby30歲。他與Margaret Wroth結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。他去世於1516年在英國倫敦享年53歲。

zh-hans.Ettington, Warwickshire, England, United: 英国英格兰瓦維其可爾艾廷頓
zh-hans.Staunton Harold, Leicestershire, England: 英国萊希斯特斯爾史道頓 哈羅德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Shirley Esq于1463年出生在英国斯塔福爾恩維爾时，他的父亲John Shirley, Lord of Ettington32岁，母亲Eleanor Willoughby30岁。他与Margaret Wroth结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。他去世于1516年在英国倫敦享年53岁。

nameMeanings.name: Shirley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the places so named, such as Shirley (Warwickshire), Shirley in Millbrook (Hampshire), Shirley (Surrey), Shirley in Owston (Yorkshire), and Shirley (Derbyshire). The placenames probably derive from Old English scīr ‘bright’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’, though some may have scīr ‘district, shire’ as the initial element if they lie on a boundary; for example, the Warwickshire place lies on the Warwickshire-Worcestershire boundary. The name Shirley first appears in Ireland in the late 17th century, following the granting of lands to a Shirley family in the barony of Farney, Monaghan.

History: William Shirley (1694–1771) was born in Sussex, England, and came to MA in 1731. He rose in the colonial service, was appointed governor in 1741, and was responsible for the British capture of the French fortress of Louisbourg, Cape Breton Island, in 1745.

variants.name: Sherley
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Shirley  .
Americanized form of Norwegian Sjøli or Sjølie: habitational name from a farmstead named with sjø ‘sea, lake’ + li ‘hillside’.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Shirley Esq was born in 1463, in Enville, Staffordshire, England, his father, John Shirley, Lord of Ettington, was 32 and his mother, Eleanor Willoughby, was 30. He married Margaret Wroth. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. He died in 1516, in London, England, at the age of 53.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Shirley Esq est né en 1463, à Enville, Staffordshire, Angleterre, son père, John Shirley, Lord of Ettington, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Eleanor Willoughby, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Wroth. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1516, à Londres, Angleterre, à l’âge de 53 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Shirley Esq 1463 in Enville, Staffordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Shirley, Lord of Ettington 32 und seine Mutter Eleanor Willoughby 30. Er hat Margaret Wroth geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Er starb 1516 im Alter von 53 Jahren in London, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Shirley Esq è nato il nel 1463 nel Enville, Staffordshire, England, il suo padre, John Shirley, Lord of Ettington, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Eleanor Willoughby, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Wroth. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì nel 1516, nel London, England, all'età di 53 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Shirley Esqが1463年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアエンヴィルで生まれた時，父John Shirley, Lord of Ettingtonは32歳，母Eleanor Willoughbyは30歳であった。Margaret Wrothと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼は1516年にイギリスロンドンで53歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Shirley Esq(이)가 1463년 영국 스태퍼드실르 빌에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Shirley, Lord of Ettington(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Eleanor Willoughby(은)는 30세였다. 그는 Margaret Wroth(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1516년 영국 런던에서 53세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Ettington, Warwickshire, England, United: Ettington, Wæringscīr, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Shirley Esq nasceu em 1463, em Enville, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Shirley, Lord of Ettington, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor Willoughby, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Wroth. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1516, em London, Inglaterra, com 53 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Shirley Esq родился в 1463 г. в местности энвилл, стаффордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени John Shirley, Lord of Ettington было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Eleanor Willoughby, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Wroth. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Он умер в 1516 г. в местности Лондон, Англия в возрасте 53 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Shirley Esq nació en 1463, en Enville, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Shirley, Lord of Ettington, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Eleanor Willoughby, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Margaret Wroth. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió en 1516, en London, Inglaterra, a la edad de 53 años.
